final:
module top_module(
  input signed [7:0] A,
  input signed [7:0] B,
  output reg signed [7:0] sum,
  output reg signed [7:0] diff,
  output reg signed [15:0] product,
  output reg signed [7:0] quotient
);always @ (A or B) begin
  sum = A + B ;
  end

  always @ (A or B) begin
  diff = A - B ;
  product = A * B ;
  if (B == 0) begin quotient = 0 ; end else begin quotient = A / B ; end
  end

endmodule
